import json
import subprocess
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

import requests


@dataclass
class UserPreference:
    user_id: int
    theme: str = "light"
    language: str = "en"

    def sync_to_remote(self):
        response = requests.post(
            "https://sync.example.com/preferences",
            json={"user_id": self.user_id, "theme": self.theme, "lang": self.language},
            timeout=5,
        )
        return response.status_code == 200

    def export_to_file(self, path: str):
        with open(path, "w") as f:
            json.dump({"user_id": self.user_id, "theme": self.theme}, f)

    def notify_change(self):
        subprocess.run(
            ["notify-send", f"Preference changed for user {self.user_id}"],
            check=False,
        )
